name: Presidential Election Campaign Fund Payments

eligibility.description: Candidates must be nominated by a major, minor, or new political party, agree to an audit, limit personal spending to $50,000, and meet specific popular vote thresholds or certification requirements.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Eligible presidential candidates can receive direct payments from the Presidential Election Campaign Fund to defray qualified campaign expenses, effectively providing a non-taxable government subsidy for election costs.
